content: Thais and Salvador are great picks to start off with, and you can put them into a team with caucus and goliath (they are standard units in the permanent banner) too. Salvador despite being a warden can actually do some damage with his skill5 card and i do recommend looking into his E2 (get two additional copies) if you end up liking his play style.
Anyway thais is the best general caro support yet in the game
+guides

Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:
## General Guide
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1THjxR9hHs4NWHqSWHHa2dHAGuE_cRGelfzXdBfCnIlM/edit?usp=sharing>) by Cheri
- [Game Mechanics](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1417994340177022981) by Mythag University
- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University 
- [Morimens Database and Teambuiler](https://skeydb.com/#/database) by Fjant
## Mode Specific
- [P-Dive Shortest Map Analysis](<https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1483756178340315216>) by Aurora
## Compendium
- [Morimens Compendium](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University
- [Boss Compendium](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University

I would personally switch Tulu out for Tawil as he can be hard to play effectively, and also consider subbing Hameln in he works pretty well with Tawil.
For general strategy you want to save your murphy exalt for when the boss is about to deal heavy damage, and also use your shield ability for survivability.
As for if you want to use Miryam, save her obsession/sacrament card in hand because it powers up her cards.
Caucus doesnt fit in too well with this team as his playstyle has practically little to no synergy there. You could make it work but dont play too much of his cards.

Also prioritize Hameln and Miryam's rouses
And don't heal up at junctions just because you can, most of the time you want to wait until you're at about 25% health to heal up to 63% ish health and you're good to go
+guides

If you have sources of alienus like Miryam, Vortice works pretty well here with the nuke. I ran Vortice Miryam Tulu Murphy.Fauxborne if I remember correctly still.
But you can always change it up anyways just don't play Tulu's cards if you ever end up putting him in put the common wheel of detinies i ran greed and the one that lets you sell symptom cards.

You don't even need to level up vortice to level 60 she works even at level 1 just make sure you can get a lot of tentacle damage and anyways for survivability you kind of have to rely on the tentacle stances.
P.S. please work on your covenants know what your awakener wants this is usually the stat on their recommended wheel of destiny
+guides

Aisha is one of the harder bosses in the game so struggling is understandable

i agree with aodkxkoa, vortice is your best shot here. you can run something like vortice gmurphy corposant faint, and try to oneshot phase 2 with vortice exalt

use R wheels, gluttony gives you 44% more max hp and is practically mandatory in arc 1. frenzy and emerge let you buy a lot of cursed relics, things like +2 arithmetica or +35 aliemus from every strike defense
this is trolling, she needs levels for her pursuit dmg
not to mention it boosts your hp, which is obviously relevant if you are dying and cant clear
and hp scales divine aequor tentacle dmg
I know lmao im justvsaying its pretty low investment
Hp of course matters
By the looks of it this guy already has vort on 50

Doll inferno works wirh nymphaea as a poison comp and actually most of the poison should come from doll.inferno, however it's high investment you need to get 7 extra copies for the overexalt for it to carry
It can work low investment but it'll be a struggle

For building options
Consider Helot: Catena and Thais first.
If you're looking to pull new units consider Murphy: Fauxborne and Pickman
Maybe vortice too but she's more of a high performance floor low performance ceiling unit
+guides

Nothing's inherently wrong with this but it is lacking a bit of synergy, you don't usually want 3 wardens on your team
If you want to use helot you can get aigis in
Might be a bit late here but heavy hitters? Murphy is your pick with her exalt
It comes out may 30th
You just gotta follow random people and pray you find someone willing to lend you a salvador
I have him e2 and his default wheel tho, if you want like a half built version we could friend and i'll put it up for a week or so
sadly no, small indie company, please understand
you can filter by awakener in the support menu, but this only shows you keepers of a similar level to you
What are the options again i forgot
Helot catena is good, just put anyone that's caro and make it a pure caro team and you're all set
Helot.catena, aigis, ogier and faint is OK.
Dont use leigh shes underwhelming and also helot.cayena is about 4-5x better than the normal helot

current story stage: 4-10
I am planning on pulling big for saya btw
(trying to remember how to check my wheels)
here are the wheels i have as well

my current lineup is this, focus on poison
my IDEA for the team (which may be flawed) is that goliath does regular damage, karen helps give more moves to spend big damage with and faros+nymph poison spread
(and no, i did not intentionally pull for faros, she just... kept showing up)

Hi, I'm looking for advice on where to progress my account. I started a couple days ago, currently on Arc 1 Chapter 5. 

Not too sure what/who to pull for anymore, tbh been just pulling to gamble sometimes. 

Aiming to be a F2P account, I have around ~150 limited pulls currently. 

Current team I'm using for story prog is:
GHelot + Thais + Horla + Aigis

Appreciate all and any help!
